Title: Assign order role to user
Preconditions: User with admin permissions to manage users
Steps:
Step Description:
Navigate to Browse->Security->Users and selects a user.
Expected Result:
The system displays the user details.
Step Description:
1.Select the Roles widget that can be either empty or contains the roles previously assigned to the selected user.
2.Click the ‘Assign’ button to assign a new role to the user.
3. Select the role(s) and confirms the selection by clicking the ‘OK’ button.
Expected Result:
The system assigns the selected role to the user.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. The system displays the user details.
2. The system assigns the selected role to the user.
Steps (Step):
1. Navigate to Browse->Security->Users and selects a user.
2. 1.Select the Roles widget that can be either empty or contains the roles previously assigned to the selected user.
2.Click the ‘Assign’ button to assign a new role to the user.
3. Select the role(s) and confirms the selection by clicking the ‘OK’ button.

Order was Cancelled

FFC > Check stock qty

All stock inventory was returned
